zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Robert Latimer of Dorset於1355年出生在英國英格蘭多瑟特邦藍 牛頓時，他的父親SIR ROBERT LATIMER39歲，母親Catherine de Hull30歲。他於1383年與Lady Margaret de Peche在英國多瑟特結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1443年在英國英格蘭多瑟特享年88歲。

nameMeanings.name: Latimer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a Latinist, a clerk who wrote documents in Latin, from Anglo-Norman French latinier, latim(m)ier. Latin was more or less the universal language of official documents in the Middle Ages, displaced only gradually by the vernacular – in England, by Anglo-Norman French at first, and eventually by English.

variants.name: Latner
meanings: English: occupational name for a worker in or maker of latten or brass, from Middle English latoun ‘brass’ (Old French laton). This name may sometimes have been confused with Latimer .
Altered form of German   Lattner   or   Lettner  .

variants.name: Lattner
meanings: German: occupational name for a carpenter who prepared or used laths or slats, from Middle High German latte ‘slat, lath’ + -n (plural suffix) + the agent suffix -er.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Robert Latimer of Dorset was born in 1355, in Buckland Newton, Dorset, England, United Kingdom, his father, SIR ROBERT LATIMER, was 39 and his mother, Catherine de Hull, was 30. He married Lady Margaret de Peche in 1383, in Dorset, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1443, in Dorset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 88.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Robert Latimer of Dorset est né en 1355, à Buckland Newton, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, SIR ROBERT LATIMER, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Catherine de Hull, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Lady Margaret de Peche en 1383, à Dorset, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1443, à Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 88 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Latimer of Dorset(이)가 1355년 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 벅랜드 뉴턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 SIR ROBERT LATIMER(은)는 39세였고, 그의 어머니 Catherine de Hull(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1383년 영국 도르세트에서 Lady Margaret de Peche(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1443년 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트에서 88세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Robert Latimer of Dorset родился в 1355 г. в местности буккланд нютон, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени SIR ROBERT LATIMER было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Catherine de Hull, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Margaret de Peche в 1383 г. в местности дорсет, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1443 г. в местности дорсет, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 88 лет.
